untranslatable_reason: Island Bottom requires multi-bar pattern recognition (exhaustion gap followed by upward gap) and specific volume profile sequencing across multiple periods (high left shoulder volume, diminished head volume, low right shoulder volume, then spike). Available indicators cannot detect: (1) gap persistence duration, (2) multi-bar volume distribution pattern, (3) two consecutive gap events with specific directional properties. Pattern requires sequence logic beyond single-bar indicator conditions.
